title: Godrej Interio is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Interio is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
